title: paspalum rostratum
intro: Paspalum rostratum, also known as prickly paspalum or rostratum paspalum, is a type of warm-season grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Paspalum rostratum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Paspalum rostratum is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
